Serving the people of North Northumberland

It’s an honour to serve North Northumberland as your Labour MP. Keep up to date with my work here.

Representing North Northumberland

My Work in Parliament

It’s vital that I’m sharing your issues and concerns in Parliament. You can find all my speeches in the House of Commons here.

Parliamentary Work
Here to Help You

Surgeries

I want to be as accessible to constituents as possible. I hold regular general surgeries across the constituency, and my team hold weekly caseworker surgeries in my offices. You can get in touch below.

Find out More
Standing Against Persecution

UK Special Envoy for Freedom of Religion or Belief

It’s an honour to represent North Northumberland globally as the Government’s Special Envoy for Freedom of Religion or Belief. Nobody should be persecuted for what they believe. Read more below.

FoRB Role
A Brief Introduction

David Smith MP

I’m honoured to be your Labour MP. North Northumberland is a beautiful constituency with common sense British values of respect, hard work, and fair play. Those are my values too, and I’m determined to be an active voice for you in Parliament.

I grew up in a family for whom the Labour movement was transformational. I was shaped by the positive legacy of my grandparents’ Labour activism in their own community, and I’m deeply grateful for the opportunity to add to that legacy.

Before entering Parliament, I worked in the charity sector for twenty years. Most recently I led a homelessness charity in the North East where the principles of fairness, justice, compassion and empowering the vulnerable were central to everything we did. These principles continue to guide me as your MP.

I promise to work with you locally and represent you in Parliament so that together we can make sure North Northumberland gets its fair share.

Putting North Northumberland on the map.

Serving the length & breadth of North Northumberland.

My two offices are here to support you and champion the wonderful place in which we live. Please get in touch to book an appointment. You can also contact me in Westminster.

Berwick Office

Berwick upon Tweed, TD15 1BN
Morpeth Office
13 Telford Court
Morpeth, NE61 2DB
Westminster Office
House of Commons
London, SW1A 0AA

Upcoming Surgeries & Events

I host regular surgeries and events across North Northumberland to meet and support as many constituents as possible. Click on events to find out more and book-in. It would be lovely to meet you.

Terms | Privacy | Cookies

Your Data Preferences

Welcome to my site. We use cookies, which involves storing or accessing limited information on your device, in order to provide web functionality, monitor traffic, provide security, and gain analytics insights. We take your privacy seriously; continuing to use this site indicates your acceptance of our privacy policy, cookies policy and terms and conditions. You can view these via the links below.

Functional Always active
The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.
Preferences
The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.
Statistics
The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.
Marketing
The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.
